problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization may resolve Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
